name: Lucide Icon Picker
description:
Elevate your Bubble applications with the ultimate Lucide Icons plugin, meticulously designed to bring thousands of premium, pixel-perfect icons straight to your design environment. Whether you're building a sleek dashboard, a vibrant landing page, or a complex web app, this plugin offers an unparalleled library of crisp, scalable vector icons that adapt seamlessly to your brand's unique identity. Say goodbye to the hassle of importing custom SVG files manually or settling for generic default libraries.

With our Lucide Icon Picker and Viewer elements, you gain access to over 1,000 top-tier icons with customizable stroke weight (numeric stroke width) and dynamic colors. This extensive variety ensures that your user interface remains consistent, modern, and highly professional across every single page and state. The integrated blazing-fast search feature allows you and your users to effortlessly find the exact icon needed in milliseconds, enhancing the UX of your own application's builders or profile customization screens.

The Picker element fully supports Bubble's autobinding: the `value` property is the autobinding target, and the component automatically prioritizes the bound value, then falls back to `initial_icon` (or `"smile"` if empty). The search field placeholder also gracefully falls back to `"Search..."` when no custom placeholder is provided. All rendering is handled client-side via the official Lucide UMD bundle loaded in your app header, and the Viewer reports click interactions through a dedicated `is_clicked` event without displaying any fallback text when an icon is missing.

Built with performance and flexibility in mind, this plugin is completely lightweight and optimized for Bubble. Every icon can be deeply customized directly within the Bubble editor—adjust colors, dynamically bind sizes to your database, and switch stroke weights on the fly to match hover states or active tab indicators. Give your users the premium experience they deserve and make your application stand out with beautiful, responsive, and easy-to-implement iconography using the industry-standard Lucide Icons collection!
